title: 隨園詩話
author: Yuan, Mei
summary: Yuan Mei's Suiyuan Shihua is a collected series of poetic critiques, anecdotes, and literary reflections mixing personal reminiscence with classical commentary. Across short entries he examines poetic taste, metrics, and authenticity, praises and criticizes past and contemporary poets, recounts examroom incidents, patronage, friendships, and provincial life. He contrasts true creative spirit with pedantry and factional literary schools, discusses musical and ritual texts, and preserves epigrams, couplets, and fragmentary verses. The work situates poems in social and geographical contexts—Nanjing, Suzhou, Yangzhou, Hangzhou—while recording lines, editorial disputes, and meditations on style and morality.

characters.name: 袁枚
characters.age: various (21 at 乾隆丙辰 anecdote)
characters.personality: forthright critic, witty, affectionate patron of poets
characters.lifespan: rises to fame as poet and compiler; edits and publishes collected notes and poems

characters.name: 金震方 (撫軍金震方先生)
characters.lifespan: praised Yuan, left several volumes of poetry that went uncompiled after death

characters.name: 尹文端 (大司寇尹公)
characters.personality: supportive official, fond of rhyming and social wit
characters.lifespan: served as senior official; influential in Yuan's early career

characters.name: 趙仁叔
characters.personality: concise, epigrammatic (famous for a memorable couplet)
characters.lifespan: locally remembered chiefly for one striking couplet

characters.name: 張桐城相公
characters.personality: consistent poetic style, steady official career
characters.lifespan: rose from Hanlin to prime minister; poems noted for steadiness

characters.name: 楊誠齋
characters.personality: acute critic who distinguishes '格調' and '風趣'
characters.lifespan: recognized as insightful literary commentator

characters.name: 金聖嘆
characters.personality: sharp, fond of annotating and criticizing novels
characters.lifespan: celebrated commentator and occasional disparaged figure; wrote praised verses

characters.name: 孔東堂
characters.personality: collector and adapter of dramatic works
characters.lifespan: involved in staging and editing '桃花扇' and related poetry

characters.name: 蔣士銓 (苕生)
characters.age: young when writing wall-poems; later made 翰林
characters.lifespan: wrote anonymous inscriptions, later became a Hanlin and friend of Yuan

characters.name: 陶元藻 (篁村)
characters.lifespan: identified later as the anonymous wall-poet; continued writing and traveling

characters.name: 王次回
characters.personality: gifted poet with distinct voice ('疑雨集')

characters.name: 韓蘄王
characters.lifespan: later achieved rank; anecdote shows youthful impulsiveness

characters.name: 光武 (Emperor Guangwu, anecdotal)

characters.lifespan: later became emperor; anecdote used to show modest origins

characters.name: 張勇 (靖逆侯張勇)

characters.name: 陳梅岑

characters.lifespan: composed notable exam-related verses

characters.lifespan: an old scholar rewarded and comforted by patrons; lived to advanced age
